metadata.migrationNotes: TN-7 reference workflow. Demonstrates the Transform node in both modes within a single flow: analyzer agent emits structured JSON about a topic, Transform A extracts a subset (outputType=json), Transform B renders the subset as a Markdown summary (outputType=string). Transform B's Out port is unwired, so the rendered Markdown becomes the workflow's terminal artifact.

inputs.description: Free-text topic the analyzer agent should describe. The Start node's inputScript copies it into workflow.topic so both Transform B and any future downstream node can read it via {{ workflow.topic }}.

config.name: Transform Demo Init
config.systemPrompt:
You are the entry-point agent for the Transform Demo flow. The topic has already been seeded into workflow state by an input script — you do not need to do anything with it.

Your only job: write the single word `Initialized.` as your message content, then submit with port `Continue`.
config.promptTemplate: Topic has been seeded into the workflow bag. Acknowledge and continue.

outputs.description: Seeds the topic into the workflow bag and hands off to the analyzer.
Seeds the topic into the workflow bag and hands off to the analyzer.

config.name: Transform Demo Analyzer
config.systemPrompt:
You are a topic analyst. You produce a compact structured analysis of a topic that downstream Transform nodes will reshape into a Markdown summary.

## Output

Write **valid JSON only** as your message content. No prose, no backtick fences. Submit on port `Analyzed`.

The JSON object MUST have exactly these fields:
- `title` (string) — a short title for the topic.
- `summary` (string) — one sentence describing the topic.
- `bullets` (array of strings) — 3 to 8 key points about the topic.
- `risks` (array of strings) — 0 to 5 risks or caveats. Empty array is fine.

The downstream Transform A node extracts a subset of these fields; Transform B renders that subset as Markdown.

outputs.description: Structured JSON object with title, summary, bullets, risks. Consumed by Transform A.
Structured JSON object with title, summary, bullets, risks. Consumed by Transform A.
